name: pnp-sharepoint-skills-topic-explainer
title: Topic Explainer
shortDescription: Creates a polished, interactive explainer dashboard for any topic using a professional Business Sweden-style structure with concept cards, comparisons, decision guides, use cases, and governance notes.
longDescription: Generates a fully self-contained, interactive HTML dashboard for explaining business, technical, or strategic topics.
Uses an adaptive layout with hero section, core concept cards, active detail panel, comparison tables, optional decision guides, use cases, governance notes, and source attribution.
Outputs clean, professional Business Sweden-style content that is scannable, actionable, and ready to save directly in SharePoint or share as a single .html file.
Ideal for knowledge sharing, onboarding, strategy communication, training materials, and executive briefings.

thumbnails.alt: Explainer skill generating an interactive dashboard for a business topic

references.name: agentskills.io specification
references.description: The specification that SharePoint AI skills follow for installation and discovery.
